def negative_overloaded_dispatch_without_typing_overload_decorator():
    rule_id = "overloaded_dispatch_without_typing_overload_decorator"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Function branches on isinstance to dispatch overloads but does not use @typing.overload decorators."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
